options.label: 員工SSO+商家MFA
options.rationale: 員工與福委會走企業 IdP，商家走獨立帳號與 MFA，平衡治理與外部協作。

options.label: 全角色統一IdP
options.rationale: 全部角色都由企業 IdP 管理，治理集中但對外商家導入成本高。

options.label: 全角色本地帳號
options.rationale: 全部使用系統自管帳號，實作快但治理與風險較高。

clarifications.prompt: 身份來源與登入模型要採哪一種主路徑？
clarifications.rationale: RBAC、審計追蹤與 MCP 權限都依賴一致身份模型。
clarifications.recommendationSummary: 建議採員工/福委會企業 SSO + 商家獨立帳號 MFA，先滿足治理與落地速度。

blockingIssues.details: 目前未鎖定員工、商家、福委會與薪資角色的身份來源與 MFA 邊界，會影響權限模型與審計可追溯性。
blockingIssues.title: 身份來源與登入邊界未定

options.label: SFTP批次檔
options.rationale: 符合月結批次節奏，易與鎖帳流程整合。

options.label: HR API同步
options.rationale: 可提升即時性與回寫能力，但整合複雜度較高。

options.label: 人工CSV上傳
options.rationale: 可作短期應急，但可追溯性與穩定性不足。

clarifications.prompt: 薪資扣款資料交換要採哪些正式通道？
clarifications.rationale: 月結匯出、例外處理與鎖帳重跑都依賴可驗證的 HR 契約。
clarifications.recommendationSummary: 建議以 SFTP 批次為核心，必要時補充 API 同步，不採人工流程當正式路徑。

blockingIssues.details: 尚未明確 HR 格式欄位、傳輸通道、回執機制與重送規則，財務流程無法安全上線。
blockingIssues.title: HR 薪資整合契約未定

options.label: OAuth服務帳號+RBAC
options.rationale: 可與企業治理對齊，適合高風險 write tools。

options.label: 短效金鑰橋接
options.rationale: 可支援部分自動化場景，但需嚴格輪替與稽核。

options.label: 僅內網信任
options.rationale: 缺乏可驗證身份與最小權限控管。

clarifications.prompt: MCP server 的認證授權模式要採哪些正式機制？
clarifications.rationale: MCP 含高風險寫入能力，必須先鎖定可稽核的安全邊界。
clarifications.recommendationSummary: 建議以 OAuth 服務帳號 + tool 級 RBAC 為主，可視需要補短效金鑰。

blockingIssues.details: MCP 被要求支援高價值讀寫操作，但尚未定義 agent 身份模型、最小權限與破壞性操作保護。
blockingIssues.title: MCP 權限與安全模型未定

options.label: 先定硬性SLO
options.rationale: 可在上線前驗證尖峰吞吐，降低現場失控風險。

options.label: 先上線後優化
options.rationale: 交付較快但現場失效風險高。

options.label: 不定SLO
options.rationale: 無法客觀驗證是否可承受尖峰。

clarifications.prompt: 尖峰領餐核銷與下單流程要以哪種效能門檻作為上線標準？
clarifications.rationale: TOTP 核銷是單一路徑，若無明確容量目標將無法保證現場可用性。
clarifications.recommendationSummary: 建議在上線前鎖定可量測 SLO 並完成壓測驗證。

blockingIssues.details: 需求強調尖峰吞吐，但缺少具體吞吐量、延遲目標與可接受錯誤率。
blockingIssues.title: 尖峰吞吐與延遲 SLO 未定

options.label: 固定 Asia/Taipei
options.rationale: 單一公司場景最簡潔，能降低截單與月結邊界錯誤。

options.label: 各廠區獨立時區
options.rationale: 適用跨時區擴張，但規則與測試成本顯著增加。

options.label: 內部UTC換算
options.rationale: 技術上可行，但業務邊界容易與人員認知不一致。

clarifications.prompt: 截單、預購視窗與月結週期要用哪個時間/行事曆基準？
clarifications.rationale: 沒有統一時間規則會造成訂單邊界與財務結算錯誤。
clarifications.recommendationSummary: 建議先固定 Asia/Taipei 並明確公司行事曆規則。

blockingIssues.details: 預設前一天 17:00 截單與月結邊界已給方向，但時區與節假日規則尚未被正式鎖定。
blockingIssues.title: 時間與行事曆計算基準未定

options.label: 可配置文件模板
options.rationale: 可涵蓋不同商家類型並支援到期自動治理。

options.label: 單一必備文件
options.rationale: 實作快但合規覆蓋不足。

options.label: 人工追蹤到期
options.rationale: 缺乏自動治理，不符合需求核心。

clarifications.prompt: 商家合規文件要採哪種治理模型？
clarifications.rationale: 文件種類與到期治理會直接影響審核流程、停權規則與預警能力。
clarifications.recommendationSummary: 建議採可配置模板 + 到期自動提醒/停權流程。

blockingIssues.details: 需求要求完整文件生命週期，但未定義必備文件集合、到期寬限與停權觸發條件。
blockingIssues.title: 商家文件政策細節未定

options.label: 明確保留與刪除政策
options.rationale: 可同時滿足稽核需求與個資風險控制。

options.label: 資料永久保留
options.rationale: 實作簡單但合規與風險暴露高。

options.label: 上線後再定
options.rationale: 會造成後續補救成本與合規風險。

clarifications.prompt: 訂單/薪資/審計資料的保留與刪除策略要採哪一種？
clarifications.rationale: 涉及個資、薪資與稽核資料，沒有明確政策無法安全上線。
clarifications.recommendationSummary: 建議在 MVP 前鎖定加密、保留年限、刪除/匿名化流程。

blockingIssues.details: 薪資與稽核資料屬高敏感資訊，尚未定義保留年限、刪除策略與加密基線。
blockingIssues.title: 資料保留與合規策略未定

answers.response: Core: 員工SSO+商家MFA | Excluded: 全角色統一IdP, 全角色本地帳號
Core: SFTP批次檔 | Optional: HR API同步 | Excluded: 人工CSV上傳
Core: OAuth服務帳號+RBAC | Optional: 短效金鑰橋接 | Excluded: 僅內網信任
Core: 先定硬性SLO | Excluded: 先上線後優化, 不定SLO
Core: 固定 Asia/Taipei | Excluded: 各廠區獨立時區, 內部UTC換算
Core: 可配置文件模板 | Excluded: 單一必備文件, 人工追蹤到期
Core: 明確保留與刪除政策 | Excluded: 資料永久保留, 上線後再定

assumptions: I am treating the provided PRD/System Requirement section as the canonical scope baseline.
No prior clarification has been locked yet, so all listed decision issues remain open.
MVP implementation should prioritize end-to-end flow integrity over phase-2 optimization features.

acceptanceSignals: RBAC policy tests cover allow/deny matrix for employee, vendor, committee admin, and payroll roles.
Authenticated request context always includes actor id, role, and plant scope.
Authorization middleware is reused by both HTTP and MCP entry points.
excludedApproaches: Scattered per-handler permission checks with no shared policy layer.
Trusting internal network location as a substitute for authentication.
Maintaining separate auth logic for HTTP and MCP paths.
executionConstraints: Implement a single identity and authorization core before business endpoints.
Role model must at least include employee, vendor operator, committee admin, and payroll operator.
All mutating operations require authenticated actor context with auditable identity.
Finalize IdP and MFA boundaries per `issue-auth-source-of-truth` before production release.
features.name: Domain Access Control Foundation
features.rationale: All ordering, reconciliation, and governance workflows depend on enforceable identity and permission boundaries.
features.summary: Establish unified authentication, RBAC, and actor context used by every surface.

acceptanceSignals: OpenAPI 3.1 spec includes all official employee/vendor/admin HTTP endpoints.
`openapi.json` (or yaml) and browsable API docs are generated in CI artifacts.
Generated client/types compile without manual type patching.
excludedApproaches: Shipping runtime endpoints that are absent from the OpenAPI document.
Maintaining handwritten API types as the primary contract source.
Updating implementation first and deferring spec updates.
executionConstraints: Use OpenAPI 3.1 as formal source of truth for all external HTTP APIs.
Specify request/response schemas, error models, auth, pagination, sorting, filtering, and enum validations.
Contract changes must be synchronized with caller updates in the same delivery cycle.
Auth scheme declarations must align with the resolved identity model from `issue-auth-source-of-truth`.
features.name: OpenAPI Contract Registry
features.rationale: Contract-first execution is explicitly required to prevent API drift across frontend, backend, testing, and integrations.
features.summary: Create and maintain the complete machine-verifiable HTTP contract and documentation.

acceptanceSignals: Committee admin can review submissions with approve/reject/request-changes decisions and reasons.
Document expiry reminders and suspension actions trigger according to configured rules.
Suspended vendors are automatically prevented from being orderable.
excludedApproaches: Manual off-platform document review as the primary onboarding flow.
Document records without expiry metadata or state transitions.
Allowing non-compliant vendors to remain orderable after expiry.
executionConstraints: Support document lifecycle states: submitted, under_review, needs_revision, approved, suspended, reinstated.
Persist full operation history (upload/review/suspension/reinstatement) for audit.
Reminder cadence, mandatory document sets, and auto-suspension policy follow `issue-vendor-document-policy`.
Storage and retention controls must follow `issue-data-retention-compliance`.
features.name: Vendor Onboarding and Document Lifecycle
features.rationale: Vendor compliance governance is a first-phase requirement and controls who can legally serve employees.
features.summary: Implement vendor application, document review, expiry governance, and suspension/reinstatement.

acceptanceSignals: Employees only see vendors mapped to their plant and active service window.
Admin updates to mapping take effect immediately with audit trace.
API responses expose deterministic deliverability decisions.
excludedApproaches: Client-only filtering of deliverability without backend enforcement.
Treating vendor availability as global with no plant/time mapping.
Allowing ambiguous overlapping mapping rules without deterministic precedence.
executionConstraints: Model vendor-to-plant mapping with effective time windows and activation state.
Deliverability filtering is a hard backend constraint for browse/search/order APIs.
Conflict resolution rules for overlapping mappings must be explicit and deterministic.
Time-window evaluation uses the canonical timezone/business-calendar decision from `issue-timezone-and-business-calendar`.
features.name: Vendor-Plant Service Mapping
features.rationale: Incorrect mapping directly causes non-deliverable exposure and operational failure at scale.
features.summary: Control where and when each vendor can serve, and enforce it in all employee-facing queries.

acceptanceSignals: Vendors can create/copy menus and set per-day supply quotas.
Quota under concurrency never drops below zero or oversells.
Cutoff and preorder windows are enforced and reflected in employee view.
excludedApproaches: Unlimited inventory without enforceable quota accounting.
Hardcoded global cutoff without vendor-level configuration.
Unbounded free-text special requests as default order input.
executionConstraints: Support menu item metadata (name, description, price, image, category/health tags, availability).
Default preorder opening window is up to 7 days ahead, with vendor-configurable overrides within policy bounds.
Default latest modify/cancel cutoff is previous day 17:00, vendor-adjustable within governance rules.
Special request schema must follow the resolved control model from `issue-special-request-controls`.
features.name: Vendor Menu, Supply, and Cutoff Rules
features.rationale: Menu and quota correctness is the center of reducing order confusion and stock mismatch.
features.summary: Enable vendors to manage menus, quotas, and ordering windows safely.

acceptanceSignals: Employee can browse by calendar/week and place multi-day preorders within allowed window.
Search/filter supports price, category, health tags, deliverability, and exact remaining quantity.
UI behavior remains fully functional with recommendation features disabled.
excludedApproaches: Recommendation-first UX that hides or weakens deterministic search/filter.
Showing vendors or items not deliverable to the employee plant.
Displaying coarse stock buckets instead of exact remaining count.
executionConstraints: Prioritize deterministic search/filter and transparent item metadata for MVP.
Use employee plant scope and active mapping as non-bypassable filter criteria.
Expose exact remaining quantity sourced from authoritative inventory counters.
Keep phase-2 recommendation entry points disabled by default.
features.name: Employee Preorder Discovery Experience
features.rationale: Employee-side usability and visibility are MVP-critical for adoption and demand planning.
features.summary: Deliver multi-day browsing, filtering, and preorder entry with accurate deliverability and stock visibility.

acceptanceSignals: State transitions enforce cutoff rules for modify/cancel and return explicit domain errors on violation.
Concurrency tests prove idempotent reservations/releases with no oversell.
Order history includes complete status timeline and notifications for sold-out/out-of-stock paths.
excludedApproaches: Best-effort inventory updates without transactional guarantees.
Accepting post-cutoff modifications silently.
Maintaining separate manual refund/cancel records outside the order domain model.
executionConstraints: Implement order state machine covering place/modify/cancel/sold-out/stockout-refund flows.
Inventory reservation and release must be atomic, idempotent, and auditable.
Cutoff evaluation must use resolved timezone/calendar policy.
Performance characteristics for peak ordering should satisfy targets resolved in `issue-pickup-throughput-slo`.
features.name: Order Lifecycle and Inventory Reservation
features.rationale: Core transaction integrity prevents count errors and downstream reconciliation failures.
features.summary: Implement robust order state handling with strict inventory and cutoff enforcement.

acceptanceSignals: QR token validation is single-use and replay-protected.
Expired/invalid token attempts are rejected with auditable error records.
Load tests at agreed peak levels meet verification latency/throughput targets.
excludedApproaches: PIN/manual-name-check production fallback path.
Long-lived static QR tokens.
Client-side-only verification without server authority.
executionConstraints: TOTP QR is the only supported on-site verification mechanism.
Use short-lived, server-verifiable tokens with anti-replay controls.
Verification updates order pickup status in real time and emits audit events.
Operational SLO and sizing must match the resolution from `issue-pickup-throughput-slo`.
features.name: Pickup TOTP Verification
features.rationale: Fast and accurate pickup verification is a direct interview-validated pain point.
features.summary: Provide secure high-throughput QR verification for meal pickup.

acceptanceSignals: Vendor board shows per-plant counts, special requirements, and delivery status in near real time.
System can export daily summary, plant partition sheet, item labels, and basket list.
Generated packaging outputs are reproducible from a fixed order snapshot.
excludedApproaches: Manual spreadsheet collation as the primary fulfillment workflow.
Label generation from mutable live data without snapshot pinning.
Printing unrestricted free-text modifiers directly into packing artifacts.
executionConstraints: Provide operational board grouped by date/plant with live status and anomaly indicators.
Generate all required packaging and delivery artifacts from immutable batch snapshots.
Special requirement rendering must obey controlled schema from `issue-special-request-controls`.
Delivery status transitions must be auditable and queryable.
features.name: Vendor Operations Board and Packaging Outputs
features.rationale: Vendor-side fulfillment quality is essential to avoid mispack and wrong-delivery events.
features.summary: Give vendors real-time prep visibility and deterministic delivery output artifacts.

acceptanceSignals: Employees can view per-order deduction, refund, and dispute status details.
Dispute workflow tracks owner, SLA timer, and final resolution result.
Ledger adjustments are append-only with full trace back to order events.
excludedApproaches: Monthly lump-sum display without per-order traceability.
Off-platform dispute handling without system status visibility.
In-place mutation of financial records without adjustment lineage.
executionConstraints: Maintain per-order financial ledger entries for deduction/refund/dispute lifecycle.
Expose transparent employee-facing detail and status timeline for every monetary event.
Use append-only accounting-style adjustment records with immutable provenance.
PII and retention controls must follow `issue-data-retention-compliance` and integration shape from `issue-hr-payroll-interface`.
features.name: Payroll Ledger and Employee Transparency
features.rationale: Payroll transparency and dispute traceability are explicit employee trust requirements.
features.summary: Implement transparent payroll deduction ledger with refund and dispute tracking.

acceptanceSignals: Monthly close produces immutable settlement snapshot with deterministic totals.
HR export matches agreed schema and includes exception categories.
Re-run behavior for same cycle is idempotent unless authorized unlock occurs.
excludedApproaches: Manual editing of exported settlement files as source of truth.
Recomputing locked periods without explicit unlock governance.
Silent overwrite of prior exports.
executionConstraints: Support cycle close, lock/unlock with reason, export, and exception handling.
Exception categories must include refunds, deduction failures, and terminated employees.
Export schema/transport and cycle semantics must follow `issue-hr-payroll-interface`.
Period boundary calculations must follow `issue-timezone-and-business-calendar`.
features.name: Monthly Settlement and HR Export
features.rationale: Automated close and exception handling is a first-phase operational requirement for finance governance.
features.summary: Automate monthly payroll deduction settlement with lock controls and exception processing.

acceptanceSignals: Rule engine generates alerts for document expiry, on-time degradation, low satisfaction, and complaint spikes.
Each alert has assignee, status lifecycle, and linked remediation actions.
SLA breach indicators and closure summaries are queryable.
excludedApproaches: Static dashboards without actionable alert workflow.
Alert dismissal without reason or ownership.
Hardcoded thresholds with no governance configurability.
executionConstraints: Implement rule-based anomaly detection for required governance scenarios.
Alerts must support end-to-end workflow states with ownership and escalation metadata.
Governance process details (SLA/escalation/ticket linkage) must follow `issue-anomaly-governance-playbook`.
All actions on alerts must be auditable.
features.name: Anomaly Alerting and Governance Workflow
features.rationale: Committee admin needs proactive governance, not passive reporting.
features.summary: Provide actionable anomaly alerts with ownership, lifecycle, and remediation tracking.

acceptanceSignals: Admin queries can filter audit trails by actor, action, entity, and time range.
Cross-system correlation id links business events, API calls, and settlement changes.
Retention jobs preserve required compliance-grade audit evidence.
excludedApproaches: Relying only on ephemeral service logs for audit.
Allowing critical write operations without audit events.
Mutable audit entries without tamper evidence.
executionConstraints: Capture immutable audit events for onboarding, mapping, ordering, verification, and financial adjustments.
Expose committee admin query surfaces for audit and accountability investigations.
Actor identity and role fields must align with chosen auth source model.
Retention/deletion strategy must satisfy `issue-data-retention-compliance`.
features.name: Audit Trail and Governance Query
features.rationale: Auditability is mandatory for compliance, dispute resolution, and operational accountability.
features.summary: Implement immutable operation trails and admin-grade audit query capabilities.

acceptanceSignals: MCP exposes tools/resources for ordering, verification, vendor governance, reconciliation, and anomaly workflows.
Parity tests show MCP and HTTP produce equivalent validation and error behavior for shared operations.
High-risk MCP writes require explicit authorization and are fully audited.
excludedApproaches: MCP server with duplicated domain/business logic.
Read-only MCP that omits required write workflows.
Unauthenticated MCP access based only on network trust.
executionConstraints: MCP must be built on the same domain/service layer as HTTP APIs.
Define clear tool boundaries for query, order, verify, review, reconcile, and governance actions.
Authorization, validation, and error taxonomy must be consistent with HTTP behavior.
MCP authentication/authorization scheme must follow `issue-mcp-authz-model`.
features.name: MCP Agent Interface
features.rationale: Agent-facing integration is explicitly required as a first-class system contract.
features.summary: Deliver a secure MCP server aligned with core domain logic and permissions.

acceptanceSignals: CI fails when runtime HTTP routes are missing in OpenAPI.
CI fails when MCP schema/behavior drifts from implementation or policy tests.
Contract tests cover happy paths and representative error scenarios for core domains.
excludedApproaches: Manual periodic contract checks instead of merge-time gates.
Allowing breaking behavior without synchronized spec and caller updates.
Testing only schema snapshots without behavior assertions.
executionConstraints: Automate drift detection across OpenAPI, generated artifacts, backend behavior, and MCP definitions.
Block merges on contract inconsistency across spec, implementation, and generated clients.
Include CI tests for authz and error-model consistency in both HTTP and MCP surfaces.
Keep test suite aligned with active behavior only; avoid legacy compatibility checks.
features.name: Contract Conformance CI and Test Gates
features.rationale: Automated verification is required to prevent long-term contract and agent drift.
features.summary: Add CI gates that enforce HTTP/MCP contract correctness and behavior consistency.

acceptanceSignals: All services emit correlated traces, metrics, and logs through OpenTelemetry.
Grafana dashboards cover ordering, pickup, settlement, and anomaly workflows.
Kubernetes deployment includes health probes, scaling policy signals, and actionable alerts.
excludedApproaches: Unstructured logs without trace correlation.
Environment-specific observability semantics that break cross-env comparability.
Production go-live without SLO dashboards and alerting baselines.
executionConstraints: Adopt OpenTelemetry instrumentation and route telemetry to VictoriaMetrics/VictoriaLogs/VictoriaTraces with Grafana.
Define and publish service and product SLO dashboards, including pickup throughput and settlement reliability.
Ensure Kubernetes manifests include readiness/liveness probes and scaling hooks tied to observed load.
Thresholds for peak pickup/order checks must align with `issue-pickup-throughput-slo`.
features.name: Observability and Kubernetes Reliability Baseline
features.rationale: High-scale operations require robust monitoring and reliability controls from the start.
features.summary: Establish production-grade telemetry, dashboards, and K8s reliability controls.

acceptanceSignals: Recommendation feature is fully disabled by default via feature flag.
When enabled, recommendation output does not replace core deterministic filter/search paths.
Offline evaluation metrics can be computed without affecting transaction latency.
excludedApproaches: Always-on recommendation rollout in MVP environments.
Replacing mandatory search/filter capabilities with recommendation-only UX.
Shipping model-driven ranking without observability and rollback controls.
executionConstraints: Keep feature optional and guarded by flag default-off in MVP.
Use existing catalog/order signals without introducing separate source-of-truth state.
Maintain deterministic fallback to core discovery behavior when flag is off.
features.name: Recommendation Engine
features.rationale: Recommendation is explicitly phase-2 and must not delay or destabilize MVP flow integrity.
features.summary: Add optional personalized recommendation capability behind strict feature gating.

acceptanceSignals: Reminder scheduling can target preorder opening windows and high-demand items.
Users can opt out and reminders honor notification preferences.
Core ordering remains available even if reminder delivery fails.
excludedApproaches: Mandatory reminder delivery as a prerequisite for ordering.
Unthrottled mass notifications without preference controls.
Hardcoded one-size-fits-all reminder timing.
executionConstraints: Implement as optional feature flag default-off in MVP environments.
Use policy-driven scheduling and throttling rules.
Treat reminder delivery as non-blocking auxiliary workflow.
Track send/delivery outcomes for operations visibility.
features.name: Release Reminder and Rush Support
features.rationale: Rush and reminder enhancements are second-phase value-add features.
features.summary: Provide optional sale-opening and demand-spike reminder capabilities.

acceptanceSignals: Dashboard metrics can be sliced by vendor, plant, and date with documented definitions.
Flag-off state removes dashboard navigation and API exposure.
Dashboard queries use stable aggregated views without harming transactional workload.
excludedApproaches: Replacing core governance workflows with passive analytics-only views.
Directly querying hot transactional tables from interactive dashboards.
Publishing KPIs without formula/source documentation.
executionConstraints: Keep analytics dashboard optional and feature-flagged off by default.
Build on governed metric views with versioned definitions.
Maintain governance workflow as primary action path; dashboard is supporting insight layer.
features.name: Advanced Operations Analytics Dashboard
features.rationale: Advanced analytics is phase-2 and should build on stable MVP data contracts and telemetry.
features.summary: Deliver optional deeper operational analytics for vendors and committee admins.

options.label: 員工SSO+商家MFA
options.rationale: 員工與福委會走企業 IdP，商家走獨立帳號與 MFA，平衡治理與外部協作。

options.label: 全角色統一IdP
options.rationale: 全部角色都由企業 IdP 管理，治理集中但對外商家導入成本高。

options.label: 全角色本地帳號
options.rationale: 全部使用系統自管帳號，實作快但治理與風險較高。

clarifications.prompt: 身份來源與登入模型要採哪一種主路徑？
clarifications.rationale: RBAC、審計追蹤與 MCP 權限都依賴一致身份模型。
clarifications.recommendationSummary: 建議採員工/福委會企業 SSO + 商家獨立帳號 MFA，先滿足治理與落地速度。

issues.details: 目前未鎖定員工、商家、福委會與薪資角色的身份來源與 MFA 邊界，會影響權限模型與審計可追溯性。
issues.title: 身份來源與登入邊界未定

options.label: SFTP批次檔
options.rationale: 符合月結批次節奏，易與鎖帳流程整合。

options.label: HR API同步
options.rationale: 可提升即時性與回寫能力，但整合複雜度較高。

options.label: 人工CSV上傳
options.rationale: 可作短期應急，但可追溯性與穩定性不足。

clarifications.prompt: 薪資扣款資料交換要採哪些正式通道？
clarifications.rationale: 月結匯出、例外處理與鎖帳重跑都依賴可驗證的 HR 契約。
clarifications.recommendationSummary: 建議以 SFTP 批次為核心，必要時補充 API 同步，不採人工流程當正式路徑。

issues.details: 尚未明確 HR 格式欄位、傳輸通道、回執機制與重送規則，財務流程無法安全上線。
issues.title: HR 薪資整合契約未定

options.label: 固定 Asia/Taipei
options.rationale: 單一公司場景最簡潔，能降低截單與月結邊界錯誤。

options.label: 各廠區獨立時區
options.rationale: 適用跨時區擴張，但規則與測試成本顯著增加。

options.label: 內部UTC換算
options.rationale: 技術上可行，但業務邊界容易與人員認知不一致。

clarifications.prompt: 截單、預購視窗與月結週期要用哪個時間/行事曆基準？
clarifications.rationale: 沒有統一時間規則會造成訂單邊界與財務結算錯誤。
clarifications.recommendationSummary: 建議先固定 Asia/Taipei 並明確公司行事曆規則。

issues.details: 預設前一天 17:00 截單與月結邊界已給方向，但時區與節假日規則尚未被正式鎖定。
issues.title: 時間與行事曆計算基準未定

options.label: 可配置文件模板
options.rationale: 可涵蓋不同商家類型並支援到期自動治理。

options.label: 單一必備文件
options.rationale: 實作快但合規覆蓋不足。

options.label: 人工追蹤到期
options.rationale: 缺乏自動治理，不符合需求核心。

clarifications.prompt: 商家合規文件要採哪種治理模型？
clarifications.rationale: 文件種類與到期治理會直接影響審核流程、停權規則與預警能力。
clarifications.recommendationSummary: 建議採可配置模板 + 到期自動提醒/停權流程。

issues.details: 需求要求完整文件生命週期，但未定義必備文件集合、到期寬限與停權觸發條件。
issues.title: 商家文件政策細節未定

options.label: 固定選項
options.rationale: 出餐風險最低，最易標準化分裝。

options.label: 固定選項+短註記
options.rationale: 保留少量彈性，同時控制風險。

options.label: 不限自由文字
options.rationale: 彈性高但備餐錯誤風險大。

clarifications.prompt: 特殊備註欄位要提供到什麼程度？
clarifications.rationale: 會直接影響備餐出錯率、標籤可讀性與客服負擔。
clarifications.recommendationSummary: 建議固定選項為主，必要時加受限短註記，不開放無限制自由文字。

issues.details: 訪談建議偏向固定選項，但是否允許受限短註記仍未明確。
issues.title: 特殊備註控制範圍待決

options.label: 先定硬性SLO
options.rationale: 可在上線前驗證尖峰吞吐，降低現場失控風險。

options.label: 先上線後優化
options.rationale: 交付較快但現場失效風險高。

options.label: 不定SLO
options.rationale: 無法客觀驗證是否可承受尖峰。

clarifications.prompt: 尖峰領餐核銷與下單流程要以哪種效能門檻作為上線標準？
clarifications.rationale: TOTP 核銷是單一路徑，若無明確容量目標將無法保證現場可用性。
clarifications.recommendationSummary: 建議在上線前鎖定可量測 SLO 並完成壓測驗證。

issues.details: 需求強調尖峰吞吐，但缺少具體吞吐量、延遲目標與可接受錯誤率。
issues.title: 尖峰吞吐與延遲 SLO 未定

options.label: 責任人+SLA流程
options.rationale: 可形成可治理、可稽核的閉環。

options.label: 串接工單系統
options.rationale: 便於跨部門追蹤與升級處理。

options.label: 僅通知不治理
options.rationale: 可視化但無法確保問題被處理。

clarifications.prompt: 異常預警後續治理要採哪些流程能力？
clarifications.rationale: 沒有治理流程，預警只會成為噪音且無責任歸屬。
clarifications.recommendationSummary: 建議至少落地責任人與 SLA，並可選擇串接工單。

issues.details: 目前僅明確要有預警，尚未鎖定責任分派、升級與結案標準。
issues.title: 異常治理流程規格未定

options.label: OAuth服務帳號+RBAC
options.rationale: 可與企業治理對齊，適合高風險 write tools。

options.label: 短效金鑰橋接
options.rationale: 可支援部分自動化場景，但需嚴格輪替與稽核。

options.label: 僅內網信任
options.rationale: 缺乏可驗證身份與最小權限控管。

clarifications.prompt: MCP server 的認證授權模式要採哪些正式機制？
clarifications.rationale: MCP 含高風險寫入能力，必須先鎖定可稽核的安全邊界。
clarifications.recommendationSummary: 建議以 OAuth 服務帳號 + tool 級 RBAC 為主，可視需要補短效金鑰。

issues.details: MCP 被要求支援高價值讀寫操作，但尚未定義 agent 身份模型、最小權限與破壞性操作保護。
issues.title: MCP 權限與安全模型未定

options.label: 明確保留與刪除政策
options.rationale: 可同時滿足稽核需求與個資風險控制。

options.label: 資料永久保留
options.rationale: 實作簡單但合規與風險暴露高。

options.label: 上線後再定
options.rationale: 會造成後續補救成本與合規風險。

clarifications.prompt: 訂單/薪資/審計資料的保留與刪除策略要採哪一種？
clarifications.rationale: 涉及個資、薪資與稽核資料，沒有明確政策無法安全上線。
clarifications.recommendationSummary: 建議在 MVP 前鎖定加密、保留年限、刪除/匿名化流程。

issues.details: 薪資與稽核資料屬高敏感資訊，尚未定義保留年限、刪除策略與加密基線。
issues.title: 資料保留與合規策略未定

activation.rationale: 一旦建立正式契約，所有後續 HTTP 變更都必須受同一套契約門檻約束。

checks: CI route-to-spec diff 無新增未登錄 endpoint。
OpenAPI 變更同步產出並提交 generated client/type diff。
每個錯誤碼都能對應到 OpenAPI error schema。

reinforcements.instructions: 在每次新增或修改 HTTP endpoint 的 PR 中，同步更新 OpenAPI 與生成產物；未同步則拒絕合併。
reinforcements.name: Contract Synchronization Gate
reinforcements.policy: No externally consumed HTTP behavior may ship unless OpenAPI 3.1 and generated artifacts are updated in the same change set.

activation.rationale: MCP 上線時最容易出現規則分叉，需在該功能啟用時立即套用。

checks: 每個 MCP write tool 可追溯到與 HTTP 共用的 domain service。
MCP/HTTP 配對行為測試對齊驗證與錯誤碼。
不存在 MCP 專用的權限繞過路徑。

reinforcements.instructions: 建立 MCP tool-to-service 映射清單，PR review 必查是否重複實作商業規則。
reinforcements.name: MCP HTTP Domain Parity
reinforcements.policy: MCP tools/resources must reuse the same domain services, authorization, and validation stack as HTTP APIs.

activation.rationale: 完成審計基礎能力後，所有高風險寫入都必須統一留痕。

checks: 高風險寫入事件都含 actorId、role、entityId、reason、timestamp。
審計紀錄採 append-only 或等效不可竄改策略。
管理端可用 correlation id 串起跨流程操作鏈。

reinforcements.instructions: 將下單、核銷、審核、鎖帳、退款等動作註冊為必留痕事件，缺任一欄位不得上線。
reinforcements.name: Auditable High Risk Writes
reinforcements.policy: All high-risk write operations must emit immutable audit events with accountable actor context.

activation.rationale: 專案明確不追求向後相容，任何功能演進都需同步清理舊路徑。

checks: 變更後不存在 legacy/fallback 分支維持舊行為。
被替換 endpoint/DTO/handler 在同批次移除。
測試僅覆蓋現行正式行為。

reinforcements.instructions: 每次破壞式調整必須同步刪除舊碼與舊測試，不接受未驗證 fallback。
reinforcements.name: No Legacy or Fallback Paths
reinforcements.policy: Contract and behavior changes must remove superseded code paths immediately rather than preserving legacy compatibility branches.

activation.rationale: 第二階段能力必須與 MVP 核心流程隔離，避免影響首階段驗收。

checks: Optional 功能在所有 MVP 環境預設 flag=false。
Flag 關閉時無對外 UI 入口與副作用 API。
具備可執行的一鍵關閉回退步驟。

reinforcements.instructions: 所有 optional feature PR 必附 flag 配置與關閉驗證證據。
reinforcements.name: Optional Feature Flag Discipline
reinforcements.policy: All optional phase-2 capabilities must be isolated behind runtime feature flags defaulted OFF in MVP deployments.

activation.rationale: 交易與核銷是尖峰壓力主戰場，需在功能啟用時以 SLO 驗證作為放行門檻。

checks: 壓測報告覆蓋尖峰場景並達成既定 p95/p99 目標。
尖峰期間錯誤率低於已定義閾值。
監控面板可即時觀測核銷成功率與排隊深度。

reinforcements.instructions: 未達尖峰 SLO 不得進入 production rollout。
reinforcements.name: Peak Load SLO Gate
reinforcements.policy: Order placement and pickup verification must pass agreed peak-load SLO tests before production release.

activation.rationale: 財務流程一旦啟用就需要防重跑錯帳與可稽核性。

checks: 每期結算快照具唯一 cycle key 與摘要雜湊。
同 cycle 重送輸出結果一致且可驗證 idempotency。
例外清單完整覆蓋退款/扣款失敗/離職三類。

reinforcements.instructions: 結算模組上線前必須完成鎖帳、重跑與例外流程演練。
reinforcements.name: Financial Close Integrity
reinforcements.policy: Settlement close/export operations must be deterministic, idempotent, and fully auditable.

activation.rationale: 異常能力啟用時若沒有責任流程會造成告警噪音且無治理效果。

checks: 每種異常規則皆有 owner、SLA、升級路徑設定。
告警關閉必填處置摘要與責任人。
逾期未處理告警可被系統查詢與通知。

reinforcements.instructions: 異常規則上線同時提交治理 playbook 與責任矩陣。
reinforcements.name: Alert Ownership and Closure Discipline
reinforcements.policy: Anomaly alerts must have explicit ownership, SLA targets, and accountable closure records.

roles.name: Employee
responsibilities: Browse eligible vendors and pre-order meals across upcoming days.
Manage orders before cutoff and complete pickup verification.
Track payroll deductions, refunds, and dispute progress transparently.

roles.name: Vendor Operator
responsibilities: Maintain menus, daily supply, preorder windows, and stock changes.
Use operational board and packaging outputs for fulfillment and delivery.
Review monthly settlement summaries against platform records.

roles.name: Welfare Committee Admin
responsibilities: Review vendor onboarding/documents and enforce suspension/reinstatement.
Configure vendor-plant mappings and governance rules.
Execute settlement close/export and handle operational anomalies.

roles.name: HR Payroll Operator
responsibilities: Consume payroll deduction exports and return processing exceptions.
Reconcile deduction outcomes with platform settlement cycles.
Support traceable handling of failed deductions and termination cases.

roles.name: Product Owner
responsibilities: Control MVP scope and acceptance boundaries.
Prioritize backlog sequencing across employee, vendor, and admin flows.
Own clarification closure for open decision issues.

roles.name: Backend Engineer (Rust)
responsibilities: Implement domain services, transactional integrity, and API/MCP handlers.
Enforce authorization, validation, and audit emission in backend flows.
Maintain OpenAPI-first contracts and contract conformance tests.

roles.name: Frontend Engineer (SvelteKit)
responsibilities: Build employee/vendor/admin interfaces aligned with contract-generated types.
Implement multi-day preorder, operational board, and transparency views.
Ensure optional features remain properly flag-gated.

roles.name: Platform SRE
responsibilities: Operate Kubernetes deployments, autoscaling, and reliability controls.
Implement observability stack integration and service dashboards.
Enforce SLO gates for peak ordering and pickup traffic.

roles.name: QA and Contract Automation Engineer
responsibilities: Build automated tests for domain logic, API contracts, and MCP behavior.
Maintain CI drift detection across OpenAPI, SDK outputs, and runtime behavior.
Validate regression risks on cutoff, inventory, settlement, and pickup paths.

roles.name: Security and Compliance Engineer
responsibilities: Define auth, key management, and least-privilege policies for HTTP/MCP.
Set retention, encryption, and audit controls for payroll and PII data.
Review high-risk flows for governance and traceability requirements.

snapshot.summary: Backlog prioritizes MVP flow integrity (auth, contract-first APIs, ordering, pickup, settlement, governance) before phase-2 value-add features. The main blockers are identity model, HR payroll contract, time/calendar policy, document governance, MCP authz, throughput SLO, and data retention policy. Reinforcements enforce non-legacy implementation, contract parity, auditable high-risk writes, and release gates for performance and optional features.
